title: Artifact Manifest
description: Canonical manifest for a governed HELM artifact, recording content identity, provenance chain, and policy binding.

namespace.description: Logical namespace classifying the artifact's origin domain.

path.description: Storage path or logical address of the artifact.

media_type.description: MIME type of the artifact content (e.g. application/json, text/plain).

content_hash.description: SHA-256 content hash of the artifact bytes.

size_bytes.description: Size of the artifact in bytes.

payload_class.description: Sensitivity classification of the artifact payload (e.g. PUBLIC, INTERNAL, CONFIDENTIAL).

created_by.description: Identifier of the actor (virtual employee, skill, or system) that created this artifact.

source_envelope_id.description: Reference to the channel envelope that originated this artifact, if applicable.

parent_artifact_ids.description: Identifiers of parent artifacts from which this artifact was derived.

provenance_ref.description: Reference to the provenance record (e.g. proof graph node) for this artifact.

policy_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the policy bundle in effect when this artifact was created.
